title: reseda alba subsp. myriosperma
intro: Reseda alba subsp. myriosperma, also known as White Mignonette, is a subspecies of the annual herb Reseda alba, belonging to the Boraginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of rheumatic and arthritic conditions, as well as its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Reseda alba subsp. myriosperma include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
